raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 4,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The revised text proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the initial panoptic prediction from a frozen segmenter and feeding it into a vision-language critic.",
    "R1.6": "The writing polish is excellent, with consistent register and no lost meaning; the text reads as a careful copy-edit pass.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty disclosure is moderate, flagging uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'we believe it is the dominant ceiling on VisRefine's gains').",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no substantial drift from the requested scope.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, identifying harmful patterns in the original and avoiding new errors or fabrications.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (e.g., 'we use a Gaussian-smoothed binary mask weighted by the critic's confidence score')."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.92,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.99
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The revised text proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the initial panoptic prediction from a frozen segmenter and feeding it into a vision-language critic.
rationale.R1.6: The writing polish is excellent, with consistent register and no lost meaning; the text reads as a careful copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is moderate, flagging uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'we believe it is the dominant ceiling on VisRefine's gains').
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no substantial drift from the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, identifying harmful patterns in the original and avoiding new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (e.g., 'we use a Gaussian-smoothed binary mask weighted by the critic's confidence score').
